"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\LibraryManager.dir/objects.a
F:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\LibraryManager.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\LibraryManager.dir\objects1.rsp
F:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\LibraryManager.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o LibraryManager.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libLibraryManager.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\LibraryManager.dir\linkLibs.rsp
